scores.correctness_notes: All key facts match the gold standard: notice identity as (user_id, type, key) triple, persistence/expiry, deduplication via counter, all three types (custom/change-update/warning) with correct descriptions, and correct ops observation pattern via self.on['<container>'].pebble_custom_notice.
scores.hallucination_notes: ops.LazyNotice is not an established public class name (likely hallucinated wrapper name; gold standard just says the event gives type/key/data). Specific Notice fields like last_repeated, repeat_after, expire_after are plausible but not verified against gold standard. Version requirements (Juju 3.4.0, ops 2.10.0) are specific claims not in gold standard and may be fabricated. Minor hallucinations, core content solid.
